name: gw
description: Unified Google Workspace CLI gateway for Gmail, Drive, Docs, Sheets, Calendar, and Chat operations.
capability_summary: Unified gateway for Google Workspace. Use for Gmail (send/list), Drive (upload/share), Docs (formatting/markdown), Sheets (logging), Calendar (scheduling), and Chat.

parameters.name: service
parameters.description: Top-level service selector: gmail, drive, docs, sheets, calendar, chat.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: Service command to execute (examples: send, list, upload, share, append-markdown, log, schedule).

parameters.name: args
parameters.description: Additional CLI flags/values passed through to gw (supports --json for structured output).

subcommands.name: gmail send
subcommands.description: Send an email message via Gmail with recipient, subject, body, and optional attachments.

subcommands.name: gmail list
subcommands.description: List Gmail messages with optional query and pagination controls.

subcommands.name: drive upload
subcommands.description: Upload a local file to Google Drive with optional target folder selection.

subcommands.name: drive share
subcommands.description: Grant Drive file permissions to user/group/domain with role controls.

subcommands.name: docs append-markdown
subcommands.description: Append markdown-formatted content to an existing Google Doc.

subcommands.name: docs format
subcommands.description: Apply document formatting operations to ranges or structural elements.

subcommands.name: sheets log
subcommands.description: Write log/event values into a spreadsheet range for operational tracking.

subcommands.name: calendar schedule
subcommands.description: Create or update calendar events with start/end times and attendees.

subcommands.name: chat send
subcommands.description: Send messages to Google Chat spaces for notifications and updates.

flags.name: --help
flags.description: Show command help and available usage patterns.

flags.name: --json
flags.description: Emit structured JSON output for machine/agent consumption.
